name: Metal Luxe Kids' Wall Shelf Gold - Pillowfort™: Scalloped Floating Iron Wall Organizer, 24" Wide
description: Decorate and organize your kid's space with the Metal Luxe Kids' Wall Shelf from Pillowfort™. This rectangle wall shelf is made with metal and features scalloped edges for a decorative look. Easy to integrate into a wide variety of decor styles, this gold-tone wall shelf makes a attractive and practical addition to their space.
